text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O has successfully<n>conquered this
year's Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Her victory comes as a rare and<n>extraordinary
achievement.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oooh! The Triple Crown! I've won the<n>Senior
Autumn Triple Crown, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The autumn Tenno Sho, the Japan<n>Cup, and the
Arima Kinen—I have<n>emerged victorious in all three
of<n>these illustrious races!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ahh! I am nearly suffocated by the<n>immense love
victory has for me, but<n>such is the price of being a
star.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, I do believe my accomplishment<n>deserves a
celebratory parade!<n>Come, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After a lap around the city, we are<n>sent a gift to
commemorate our<n>completion of the Senior
Autumn<n>Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, to unveil the memorabilia which I<n>myself had
created.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Open sesame!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Riiip!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Behold! To mark my successful<n>completion of the
Senior Autumn<n>Triple Crown, I give you this
one-of-a-kind T.M. Opera figure!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's life-size and elaborately realistic,<n>to a
frightening degree. The thing<n>might come alive any
second...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! With masterful<n>craftsmanship and
breathtaking<n>beauty, it is as if it, too, harbors my
very soul.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: And it can pose like this!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes, the spitting visage of yours truly.<n>By instinct,
you might just bow your<n>head in reverence.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: But that's not all!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It can pose like this as well! I<n>requested forty-eight
articulation<n>points, you see.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Optional accessories include a<n>scepter, holy
sword, and more. That<n>factory in Shizuoka
certainly does fine<n>work.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Although it's a fitting piece to adorn<n>the academy
gates, I plan to take it<n>back to my room instead.
choice_data_list: You're not going to put it on display?
You're not going to put it on display?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
No. Why would fans need a statue to<n>worship
when they can see me at the<n>racecourse
whenever they wish?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
This belongs in my personal<n>menagerie. What
would make my<n>attendant roommates happier
than for<n>another me to be present?
That sounds like a real-life horror<n>movie.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
At any rate, Trainer, your work as<n>kingmaker is
also the reason I could<n>attain this wonderful
treasure.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But one is not enough! I wish for<n>more Opera
figures! More, MORE!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Then, one day, my room will become<n>adorned with
the Twelve Heavenly<n>Operas.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Should we not aim to conquer the<n>Senior Autumn
Triple Crown next<n>year as well?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: My room must be replete with me,wall to wall.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaaah ha ha!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I mustn't forget my mini-me. With a<n>press of this
button here...

text_block_list.name: Opera Os
text_block_list.text: Haaaah ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She even equipped the Opera O figure<n>with voice
playback. Their doubled<n>laughter echoes into the
winter sky.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
No matter the memorabilia, her<n>extraordinary
record remains the<n>same. Congrats, T.M. Opera O!
